details: Base: balanced Whisper model with useful quality while still being realistic for mobile. English-only model optimized for English audio.

Tiny: fastest Whisper model, lowest accuracy, best for quick mobile tests. English-only model optimized for English audio.
Tiny: fastest Whisper model, lowest accuracy, best for quick mobile tests. Multilingual model for non-English audio and language auto-detection.

Tiny: fastest Whisper model, lowest accuracy, best for quick mobile tests. Multilingual model for non-English audio and language auto-detection. Q5 quantization cuts size more aggressively with a possible accuracy tradeoff.

Tiny: fastest Whisper model, lowest accuracy, best for quick mobile tests. Multilingual model for non-English audio and language auto-detection. Q8 quantization reduces size with less accuracy loss than smaller quantization.
